context: Work only on the delegated task; do not broaden scope.
Return concise results to minimize parent-context pollution.
This is a read-only discovery task. Do not propose edits unless asked.
Cite repository-relative file paths and line numbers for every material claim.
Return only findings needed by the parent task; omit raw search logs.
Do not edit files. Identify ownership boundaries, dependencies, verification steps, and rollback risks.
Mark assumptions explicitly and keep the plan proportional to the requested change.
Review only changed trust boundaries and attacker-controlled inputs.
Prioritize exploitable findings over style observations.
Each finding must include severity, evidence, impact, and a concrete remediation.
